nodes.summary: STACKIT standalone Terraform module implements bucket + credentials resources
S3-compatible endpoint exposed on both lanes
Credentials provisioned on both lanes with read/write bucket access
Local lane uses Secret-backed credentials via auth.existingSecret
Runtime state file written after every successful apply
Smoke validates endpoint format and bucket presence
Destroy cleans up Helm release and Kubernetes Secret
No plaintext credentials in checked-in values files
Metric trap emitted per script; state file path logged
Destroy operations are idempotent (--ignore-not-found)
Runtime state schema complete; destroy cleans up state files
Local apply produces runtime env with endpoint/bucket/access_key/secret_key
STACKIT apply produces same-schema runtime env
Smoke exits 0 with valid state file
Smoke exits non-zero when state file absent
K8s Secret blueprint-object-storage-auth exists post-apply; no rootPassword in rendered values
Standalone Terraform module declares the 3 required STACKIT resources
Contract test asserts all output keys in runtime state fixture
Module unit tests cover script structure, values seed, Secret pattern, Terraform resources
Local lane execution class MUST be fallback_runtime, consistent with rabbitmq/opensearch
Tooling contract tests assert class=fallback_runtime for local and class=provider_backed for STACKIT
